title: [W]Place of work
h1: [W]What address did the claimant work at?

workAddress1.required: [W]Enter the first line of the address the claimant worked at - up to 100 characters
workAddress1.invalid: [W]Enter a valid first line of the address the claimant worked at - up to 100 characters

workAddress2.required: [W]Enter the second line of the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters
workAddress2.invalid: [W]Enter a valid second line of the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters

workAddressTown.required: [W]Enter a town or city for the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters
workAddressTown.invalid: [W]Enter a valid town or city for the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters

workAddressCountry.required: [W]Enter a country for the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters
workAddressCountry.invalid: [W]Enter a valid country for the address the claimant worked at - up to 50 characters
